title: Feedback - send a Compliment feedback with names/email
scenario: Sending a compliment feedback with name and email from App Settings > Feedback fails to attach sender details
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap the Menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Home screen.
In the Feedback screen, tap the dropdown or selector and choose "Compliment".
Enter feedback text in the message field.
Enter the user's name in the Name field.
Enter the user's email address in the Email field.
expected: The compliment feedback is successfully sent, and the user's name and email are attached to the submission.
